channel.title: Self-Hosted on Ogenki
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Hosted on Ogenki

item.title: Self-hosted LLM stack: a solid foundation for an open-weight platform built to evolve
item.description: A self-hosted platform to run open-weight models on Kubernetes: declarative `InferenceService`, autoscaling on GPU signals, end-to-end GitOps. A foundation designed to evolve with the ecosystem.
